notes:
M1 re-validated 2026-06-05: 166/166 asserts pass; STALE-ARTEFACT finding on archived Math437 JSON (pre-repair verdict string, numerics identical) recorded in claims/B2-PROPA-HLAYER/runs/260605-migration-revalidation/summary.json. H-LAYER and H-A0 transcribed verbatim into claims/GATES.md from Math437 v1.2. Migration-clean: no legacy: pointers remain. INCIDENT 2026-06-06: an autonomous-agent tool-layer write truncated this card mid-string (CLAUDE.md sec-2 defect class). Restored from git HEAD plus this session's verified AddB-AddE field values (each passed lint/catalog/release/pytest at its turn). The autonomous U1-U16 notes remain on disk as UNVERIFIED DRAFTS (PDFs/linter pending) and did NOT modify this card. H-A0 -> H-ANCHOR 2026-06-06 (operator-authorized 'proceed with item 3'): the A=0 uniqueness/zero-at-gap is now a sign-decomposition THEOREM (L1/L2/L3 closed forms + anchor inequality m*>m_w x7.76; ha0_sign_decomposition.py 14/14, G-A0-VER closed); hypothesis strictly weakened, quadrature-scheme dependence + 5.5e-3 systematic removed from the load-bearing chain. Residual G-A0-DUI (DUI regularity, textbook). No tier-number change; the theorem strengthens. G-A0-DUI CLOSED + H-ANCHOR DEMOTED 2026-06-06 (operator-authorized clean finish, 'proceed with 1'): differentiation under the integral written out (dominated convergence, dominating function k^2/[m0+C(k^2-q0^2)^2]^2 integrable; ha0_sign_decomposition.py v1.1.0 23/23). With L1 rigorous and L2/L3 closed-form, A=0 uniqueness is UNCONDITIONAL at mu^2=0.005, resting only on the verified facts m*>m_w (x7.76) and M_R>M_c (x4.12). H-ANCHOR is thus a VERIFIED DEPENDENCY, not a hypothesis, and is removed from the hypothesis set; the off-anchor neighbourhood remains ROBUSTNESS-MU2. OPERATOR REVIEW 2026-06-06 (H-A0 docs): H-A0 is DISCHARGED AT THE PRODUCTION ANCHOR mu^2=0.005 ONLY (not on a full mu^2 interval; off-anchor = ROBUSTNESS-MU2, OPEN). ANCHOR DEPENDENCY RETAINED AS VERIFIED FACT: m*>m_w, M_R>M_c under A1-KERNEL-CONV at mu^2=0.005 -- the curve-shape quadrature systematic exits the uniqueness proof, but the anchor constants remain verified dependencies (not 'all numerical dependence removed'). This note's A=0 uniqueness result is the slaved isotropic A=0 section only, NOT a global H-LAYER closure; H-LAYER remains a named B2 hypothesis. No tier change. | T7 ENACTED 2026-06-10 (operator sign-off APPROVED): tier T6 -> T7, H-LAYER DISCHARGED from the hypothesis set (now empty for the lattice Reading-H scope). Basis: t7-proposition-assembly v1.1 (F[Q]>F[G_*] for all C_phys, non-circular) + the full T-016..T-028 chain + the internal 5-axis route audit t7-route-internal-audit v1.0 / res5_029 (61/61 chain asserts, 17/17 constants consistent, off-shell exclusion non-circular rho_off^ext=0.572<1). Scope-qualified DISCHARGED-THEOREM (lattice Reading-H comparison, operating endpoint, [x0.5,x2]); external referee pass standing. No claim on full TECT/TOE.

 C_full SCOPE ENACTED 2026-06-10 (operator decision: ACCEPT THE THIN OFF-DIAGONAL MARGIN; G1+G3 CLOSED). Tier stays T7, scope WIDENED from lattice to C_full as T7-SCOPE_{C_full, thin O}. Basis: Step 1 window-certification v1.1 (region R) + Step 2 ext-additive-energy-extremal-status (antipodal lemma T'<=N/2 + R-025 + packing => off-diagonal C_full thin closure R_lead<=0.974<1) + Step 3 DS-nonlattice-extension ((D)/(S) competitor-agnostic) + res5_035_cfull_scope_enactment (5/5: I_off^{C_full}=2.053e-3 binds, n_pack<=40.88 across band so N/2<=20<K* throughout, EXT x5.39 optional). EXT stays T2. NOT unrestricted T7.

 COMFORTABLE UPGRADE 2026-06-10: the off-diagonal C_full margin is upgraded from thin x1.026 to COMFORTABLE x1.96 by the coherence circle-packing lemma (T'<=floor(2pi/theta_min)=10, elementary; res5_036 5/5). Selection now binds (I_off^coh=3.92e-3>I_c^sel=2.41e-3) so the C_full region = full Step-1 region (20% headroom). The thin-O scope qualifier is removed: T7-SCOPE_{C_full, thin O} -> T7-SCOPE_{C_full}. EXT no longer needed for comfort (stays T2 optional). NEW coherence-offdiag-comfortable-bound v1.0; supersedes the thin framing of res5_033/035 (loose antipodal T'<=N/2 artefact). NOT unrestricted T7.
title: Proposition A: the isotropic Gaussian-Hartree layer is the strict comparison infimum (T7, H-LAYER discharged)
statement: Proposition A holds as an UNCONDITIONAL theorem (H-LAYER discharged) within the declared lattice Reading-H domain: the isotropic Gaussian-Hartree dressing G_* is the strict comparison infimum over the physical competitor class. Proposition A holds as a conditional theorem within the hypothesis pair $\{\mathrm{H\text{-}LAYER},\,\mathrm{H\text{-}A0}\}$; certified for T6-conditional use on 2026-06-05 by dual independent audit plus operator sign-off.
scope: [COMFORTABLE UPGRADE 2026-06-10, T7-SCOPE_{C_full} -- thin-O qualifier REMOVED] The coherence circle-packing lemma (coherence-offdiag-comfortable-bound v1.0, res5_036 5/5) proves T'<=floor(2pi/theta_min)=10 uniformly across the window for EVERY admissible competitor (lattice + non-lattice), so K_floor<=T'<=10 => R_lead<=0.510<1 at I_op (margin x1.96), <=0.615 at the selection cap -- the off-diagonal is COMFORTABLE, not thin. The off-diagonal cap I_off^coh=1/(23.2*11)=3.92e-3 EXCEEDS I_c^sel=2.41e-3, so the SELECTION boundary binds and the C_full operating region is the FULL Step-1 region R={mu^2 in (0,mu^2_max=0.0342), I in (0,I_c^sel(mu^2))} (20% headroom at I_op), identical robustness to the lattice class. This SUPERSEDES the thin x1.026 / cap 2.053e-3 of the earlier enactment (an artefact of the loose antipodal T'<=N/2). EXT (additive-energy extremal, K_floor~3) is now UNNECESSARY for comfort (stays T2, optional further x5.4). [Earlier thin-O enactment, now superseded:] [C_full ENACTED 2026-06-10, T7-SCOPE_{C_full, thin O}] Reading-H selection is enacted against the FULL admissible competitor class C_full (lattice + non-lattice real-antipodal, packing-bounded N<=n_pack<=41, coherence-resolved) within the certified region R_{C_full} = {mu^2 in (0, mu^2_max=3U^2/(20V)=0.0342), I in (0, min(I_c^sel(mu^2), I_off^{C_full}))}, where I_off^{C_full}=1/(23.2*21)=2.053e-3 is the universal off-diagonal cap (antipodal lemma T'<=N/2 + R-025 + packing) which BINDS for C_full. Off-diagonal margin is THIN (R_lead<=0.974<1, x1.026); (D) diagonal-isotropy and (S) selection sectors are competitor-agnostic (comfortable). Operating point (I=2e-3, mu^2=0.005) interior, 2.6% off-diagonal headroom. NOT unrestricted T7. G1 (thin margin) + G3 (operator sign-off) CLOSED 2026-06-10; G2 (external referee) is a validation gate. EXT optional (T2, x5.39). [Prior lattice scope retained as the comfortable-margin sub-case:] T7 DISCHARGED-THEOREM (operator-enacted 2026-06-10, sign-off APPROVED) within the DECLARED PHYSICAL DOMAIN: the Reading-H comparison over the physical competitor class C_phys (crystallographic momentum-shell / lattice, packing-bounded |Q|<=n_pack, coherence-resolved >=theta_min, real antipodal) at the operating endpoint I=2e-3, ROBUSTNESS-MU2 band [x0.5,x2]. H-LAYER is DISCHARGED as a hypothesis by the T7 proposition (t7-proposition-assembly v1.1): F[Q]-F[G_*]>0 for all Q in C_phys, i.e. the isotropic Gaussian-Hartree layer G_* is the strict comparison infimum. Assembled from three theorem-grade blockers: A off-shell domination NON-CIRCULAR (rho_off^ext<=R_lead(20)*r_R/(r_R+c*delta^2)=0.572<1 before the registered-class reduction), C on-shell reduction (survivors T'<=13), B certified thresholds (R_lead(13)=0.650<1 off-diagonal stability, joint(13)=1.097>1 SC-SCOPE endpoint with R_max interval-enclosed<=0.391<0.634 and the Ghat4 convention DERIVED from the (2pi)^3 measure, sunset S=1.13 rigorous, anchoring u_eff>0 monotonicity-certified). NOT unconditional TECT/TOE; NOT arbitrary-Q (non-lattice DR-2 = legacy fallback). Audit basis: internal 5-axis route audit T-029 (61/61 chain asserts, 17/17 load-bearing constants re-derived from Math424) + the operator adversarial-review chain (which caught and forced correction of the factor-2 convention, the off-shell escape, and the circularity); a fully-EXTERNAL third-party referee pass remains the standing publication-grade item (recorded, not a blocker for the operator-enacted tier). === prior (pre-T7) scope retained below === Theorem-grade only within the named hypothesis pair. Not a whole-Reading-H statement: the full selection claim stays at T5 pending STEP-5B.
falsifier: A counterexample within the H-layer class violating Proposition A, or failure of the transcribed H-A0 statement to support the proof steps on migration.
no_overclaim: T7-SCOPE_{C_full} (comfortable): the coherence lemma gives the off-diagonal margin x1.96 (R_lead<=0.510<1) for the full admissible class, selection-binding, full Step-1 window (20% headroom) -- the thin x1.026 / cap 2.053e-3 framing is SUPERSEDED. Still scope-qualified (within R, given A1-KERNEL-CONV, C_full competitor class); NOT a global/all-intensity/all-competitor claim. EXT remains a separate optional T2. T7-SCOPE_{C_full, thin O}: within R_{C_full}, Reading-H selection holds against C_full competitors. NOT globally/unconditionally proven over all intensities and all competitors. The C_full intensity cap is I_off^{C_full}=2.053e-3 (THIN, 2.6% headroom), NOT the Step-1 selection cap 2.41e-3. EXT (K_floor~3, margin x5.39) is an OPTIONAL T2 margin upgrade, not required for closure. External referee (G2) remains a validation/publication gate, not an internal proof blocker. T7 is SCOPE-QUALIFIED: DISCHARGED-THEOREM within the Reading-H / H-LAYER comparison domain ONLY (lattice class, operating endpoint, [x0.5,x2]), NOT unconditional TECT and NOT the TOE. The selection SIGN is the theorem; the SC-SCOPE third-cumulant endpoint is now theorem-grade (R_max interval-enclosed, convention derived) -- the earlier THIN-CERTIFIED/estimate wording is superseded for the endpoint. HONEST AUDIT CAVEAT: governance T7 asks for dual independent audit; this is met by the internal T-029 audit + the operator adversarial-review chain, with a fully-external referee pass as the standing publication item. Sectors C-F and the full TOE are NOT closed by this enactment (they were tier-capped while GAP-1 was open; the cap lifts but each still needs its own package). === prior no_overclaim retained below === Prop-A certification does NOT promote the full Reading-H selection. 'Reading-H is T6' is forbidden while STEP-5B is open.
